  "findings": [
    "DP impulse lines sloped incorrectly for the service type",
    "Gas taps installed below the pipe centerline",
    "Liquid taps installed on top of the pipe"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-route and re-slope the impulse lines according to the service type",
    "Relocate gas taps to the top or upper 45 degrees of the pipe",
    "Relocate liquid taps to the side or lower 45 degrees of the pipe"
  ],
  "rationale": "The DP transmitter impulse lines are routed incorrectly for their respective services. Gas taps must be on top of the pipe to prevent liquid accumulation in the lines, and liquid taps must be on the side/bottom to prevent gas pocket entrapment. This classic installation error will lead to measurement errors and process control issues.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 551",
    "Manufacturer installation manuals"
  ]
}
